ddls:
CREATE TABLE "visitor_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor record */,
  "administrative" INTEGER /* Count of administrative interactions */,
  "administrative_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of administrative interactions in seconds */,
  "informational" INTEGER /* Count of informational interactions */,
  "informational_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of informational interactions in seconds */,
  "product_related" INTEGER /* Count of product-related interactions */,
  "product_related_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of product-related interactions in seconds */,
  "bounce_rates" REAL /* Bounce rate for the session */,
  "exit_rates" REAL /* Exit rate for the session */,
  "page_values" REAL /* Value of the pages visited during the session */,
  "special_day" INTEGER /* Indicator for special days (e.g., holidays) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month during which the data was collected */,
  "operating_systems" INTEGER /* Identifier for the operating system used by the visitor */,
  "browser" INTEGER /* Identifier for the browser used by the visitor */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region from which the visitor accessed the site */,
  "traffic_type" INTEGER /* Type of traffic (e.g., organic, paid, referral) */,
  "visitor_type" TEXT /* Type of visitor (e.g., new, returning) */,
  "weekend" INTEGER /* Indicator if the visit occurred on a weekend */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated during the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the visitor */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user account */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL from which the visitor arrived */,
  "utm_source" TEXT /* UTM source parameter */,
  "utm_medium" TEXT /* UTM medium parameter */,
  "utm_campaign" TEXT /* UTM campaign parameter */,
  "device_screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the visitor's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_data_traffic_type FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_type") REFERENCES traffic_types ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_data_browser FOREIGN KEY ("browser") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_data_operating_systems FOREIGN KEY ("operating_systems") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Indicator if the operating system is mobile-specific */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Indicator if the browser is mobile-specific */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_types" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic type */,
  "traffic_source" TEXT /* Name of the traffic source (e.g., organic, paid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the traffic source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)
